description_for_human: Access FMP financial statements, ratios, DCF models, and stock screening.
description_for_model: Provides access to Financial Modeling Prep's financial data API. Use this plugin to retrieve company financial statements (income, balance sheet, cash flow), financial ratios, discounted cash flow valuations, key metrics, and stock screening capabilities. Useful for financial modeling, company comparisons, valuation analysis, and quantitative screening.

functions.name: get_financial_statements
functions.description: Retrieve financial statements including income statement, balance sheet, or cash flow statement.

functions.name: get_ratios
functions.description: Retrieve financial ratios including profitability, liquidity, leverage, and efficiency ratios.

functions.name: get_dcf
functions.description: Retrieve the discounted cash flow (DCF) valuation estimate for a company.

functions.name: get_key_metrics
functions.description: Retrieve key financial metrics including revenue per share, net income per share, and enterprise value ratios.

functions.name: get_stock_screener
functions.description: Screen stocks based on financial criteria such as market cap, P/E ratio, dividend yield, and sector.
